        srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""

        LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = ""
        LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.White

        srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ""
        srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = ""
        srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.White
        srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text = ""
    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
            WriteLog("[RFID_OPEN] 포트=" & PortNumber_RFID & " BaudRate=9600 DataBits=8 IsOpen=" & Serial_RFID.IsOpen.ToString())

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteLog("[RFID_OPEN] 실패! 포트=" & PortNumber_RFID & " 에러=" & ex.Message)
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool1.Open()
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool1.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool1.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool1 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try


    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String
        Dim s As String
        Dim Tmp As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        s = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 1, 23)

        If wStep = 9 Then

            If InStr(1, ScanData, srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) <> 0 Then
                If CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ElseIf InStr(1, ScanData, srcHANESS_BArcode_Target.Text) <> 0 And srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text <> "NA" Then
                If CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_LH", "ST01_HANESS_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "중복"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcHANESS_BArcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK"
                    srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            Else
                    NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            If Len(s) = 23 Then
                TmpFrameBarcode = s
                serialNumberPart = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 13, 11)
                serialNumber = Label_Scanner.Text
                Init_Control()
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                Save_WorkPArt(serialNumberPart)
                Load_PArt(serialNumberPart)
                '3.1
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

            If Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("NNB") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.White
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            ElseIf Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("WDN") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.Black
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
                Tmp = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = Tmp
                wStep = 3.3
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then

            Dim readCmd As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H32") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03")
            Serial_RFID.Write(readCmd)
            WriteLog("[RFID_READ_CMD] 읽기명령전송 Hex=" & ToHex(readCmd) & " Len=" & readCmd.Length)

        Else
            WriteLog("[RFID_READ_CMD] 실패! Serial_RFID.IsOpen=False")
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")

        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
            WriteLog("[RFID_WRITE] 쓰기명령전송 데이터=""" & str & """ Len=" & str.Length & " 전체Hex=" & ToHex(tmp1) & " 전체Len=" & tmp1.Length)
        Else
            WriteLog("[RFID_WRITE] 실패! Serial_RFID.IsOpen=False 데이터=""" & str & """")
        End If

    End Sub

    Private TmpRfData As String

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        WriteLog("[RFID_THREAD] 수신 스레드 시작")

        Do
            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX

                        ' 수신 원본 데이터 전체 로그
                        WriteLog("[RFID_RECV] 수신완료 Len=" & sRecvData.Length & " Hex=" & ToHex(sRecvData))

                        If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                            WriteLog("[RFID_RECV] 결과=Empty (Len=" & sRecvData.Length & ")")
                        Else
                            Dim parsed As String = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 23)
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = parsed
                            TmpRfData = Label_RF_READ.Text
                            WriteLog("[RFID_RECV] 파싱결과=""" & parsed & """ Len=" & parsed.Length & " TmpRfData=""" & TmpRfData & """")
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                        Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                    End If
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                WriteLog("[RFID_THREAD] 예외! " & ex.Message & " sRecvData Hex=" & ToHex(sRecvData))
                Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
                sRecvData = ""

            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
                            label_Message.Text = ToolData.ToString()

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData

                                If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                Else
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private TMPLOT As Integer
    Private TMPYEAR As Integer
    Private TMPMONTHDATE As Integer

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_LH WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 5001, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text
        TMPLOT = Rs.RecordCount + 5001
        TMPYEAR = CInt(Format(Now, "yyyy"))
        TMPMONTHDATE = CInt(Format(Now, "MMdd"))
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then '사양 스캔 대기

            'WORK_PARTNO7' = ""

            'wStep = 3.1

            'End If

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then '4359
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "0"
            End If

            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상

            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "0"
            End If

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4350", PLC_STRING)
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            WritePlcValue("D", "4353", CShort(PartID(srcPartNo.Text)))

                (srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "OK" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "NA" Or srcHANESS_BArcode_DEc.Text = "PASS") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"

    Private Function PartID(ByVal strPArtno As String) As String

        Connection_Open()
        Dim pID As String = ""
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & strPArtno & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            pID = Rs.Fields("PLC_ID").Value
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing

        Return pID

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()

        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.160"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        WriteLog("========== 프로그램 시작 ==========")
        WriteLog("[INIT] RFID포트=" & PortNumber_RFID & " Serial_RFID.IsOpen=" & Serial_RFID.IsOpen.ToString())

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
            WriteLog("[INIT] RFID 수신 스레드 시작됨")
        Else
            WriteLog("[INIT] RFID 수신 스레드 미시작! 시리얼포트 닫힘")
        End If

        If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then
                WriteLog("[TIMER] Read_RFiD 호출 wStep=" & wStep & " TmpRfData=""" & TmpRfData & """ Label_RF_READ=""" & Label_RF_READ.Text & """")
                Read_RFiD()
            End If
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4300" & vbLf &
                                "D4301" & vbLf &
                                "D4302" & vbLf &
                                "D4303" & vbLf &
                                "D4304" & vbLf &
                                "D4305" & vbLf &
                                "D4306" & vbLf &
                                "D4307" & vbLf &
                                "D4308" & vbLf &
                                "D4309" & vbLf &
                                "D4310" & vbLf &
                                "D4311" & vbLf &
                                "D4350" & vbLf &
                                "D4351" & vbLf &
                                "D4352" & vbLf &
                                "D4353" & vbLf &
                                "D4354" & vbLf &
                                "D4355" & vbLf &
                                "D4356" & vbLf &
                                "D4357" & vbLf &
                                "D4358" & vbLf &
                                "D4359" & vbLf &
                                "D4360" & vbLf &
                                "D4361"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private OptionSAb As String

    Sub WritePlcValue(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal wValue As Short)

        ''WritePlc("D", "5053", "0")
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'


        szDeviceName = strChr & Format((Int(StartArry)), "0000") 'D 4000
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, 1, wValue)
        Catch exception As Exception
            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'The return code of the method Is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            srcPartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value

            srcPartName.Text = Trim(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value)
            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName.Text)

    Private Sub LampOK()

        Const C_index As Byte = 0
        Const C_type As Byte = 0

        Const D_not As Short = 100 ' Don't care  // Do not change before state
        Const C_lampoff As Byte = 0
        Const C_lampon As Byte = 1
        Const C_lampblink As Byte = 2

        Dim b_in As Boolean
        Dim b_vb As Boolean

        Dim bData(17) As Byte

        bData(0) = C_lampoff ' Red
        bData(1) = C_lampoff ' Yellow
        bData(2) = C_lampon ' Green
        'bData(3) = C_lampon ' Blue
        'bData(4) = C_lampblink ' White

        ' Sound      0-(off)   1-4(Sound select)
        ' Else ' Don't care   Do not change before state
        bData(5) = 0

        b_in = Usb_Qu_write(0, 0, bData(0))

        If b_in = 0 Then
            b_vb = False
        Else
            b_vb = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With GridCount

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 240
            .Column(2).Width = 150

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub


    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT JObPartNo,JobCount FROM Table_Count ORDER BY LEN(JobPartNo),JobPartNo", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF

                    GridCount.AddItem(Rs.Fields("JobPartNo").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End If

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ResetGrid()

        Dim strSQL As String

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        strSQL = "DELETE * FROM TABLE_COUNT"
        Mdb_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AddGrid(strPart As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpInt As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Count WHERE JobPartNo = '" & strPart & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

            Rs.AddNew()

            Rs.Fields("JobPartno").Value = strPart
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = "1"
            Rs.Update()

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            TmpInt = CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
            TmpInt = TmpInt + 1
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = CStr(TmpInt)
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    

End Class

    Private Sub NG()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\NG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampNG()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DingDOng()

        Me.Player.SoundLocation = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\SOUND\DINGDONG.wav"
        Me.Player.Play()

        LampOK()
        Tmr_LampCount = 0
        Tmr_Lamp.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Lamp.Start()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Button4_Click(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Button4.Click

        Dim old As Long
        If Environment.Is64BitOperatingSystem Then
            If Wow64DisableWow64FsRedirection(old) Then
                Process.Start(osk)
                Wow64EnableWow64FsRedirection(old)
            End If
        Else
            Process.Start(osk)
        End If

    End Sub

    Sub SerialOpen()

        Try
            If Serial_RFID.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_RFID.Close()
            End If
            Serial_RFID.PortName = PortNumber_RFID
            Serial_RFID.ReceivedBytesThreshold = 50
            Serial_RFID.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_RFID.DataBits = 8
            Serial_RFID.Open()
            WriteLog("[RFID_OPEN] 포트=" & PortNumber_RFID & " BaudRate=9600 DataBits=8 IsOpen=" & Serial_RFID.IsOpen.ToString())

        Catch ex As Exception
            WriteLog("[RFID_OPEN] 실패! 포트=" & PortNumber_RFID & " 에러=" & ex.Message)
            MsgBox("Serial Open Module Fail " & PortNumber_RFID)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Scanner.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Scanner.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Scanner.PortName = PortNumber_SCANNER
            Serial_Scanner.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Scanner.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Scanner.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception

            MsgBox("Serial Open Scanner Fail " & PortNumber_SCANNER)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool1.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool1.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL1
            Serial_Tool1.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool1.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool1.Open()
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool1.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool1.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool1 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL1)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Tool2.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Tool2.PortName = PortNumber_TOOL2
            Serial_Tool2.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Tool2.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Tool2.Open()
            Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200001            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
            tmr_Tool2.Interval = 5000
            tmr_Tool2.Start()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open Tool2 Fail " & PortNumber_TOOL2)
        End Try

        Try
            If Serial_Resist.IsOpen() = True Then
                Serial_Resist.Close()
            End If
            Serial_Resist.PortName = PortNumber_RESIST
            Serial_Resist.BaudRate = 9600
            Serial_Resist.DataBits = 8
            Serial_Resist.Open()

        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox("Serial Open resist Fail " & PortNumber_RESIST)
        End Try

    End Sub
    Private Sub Request_Resist()

        If Serial_Resist.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_Resist.Write(":MEAS:RES?" & ControlChars.CrLf)
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_CONNECT()

        'ACT_PLC1.ActNetworkNumber = 1
        'ACT_PLC1.ActStationNumber = 1
        ACT_PLC1.ActCpuType = 146

        ACT_PLC1.ActHostAddress = ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1
        If ACT_PLC1.Open <> 0 Then
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
        Else
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Save_WorkPArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("Select * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value = str
            Rs.Update()
        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private TmpFrameBarcode As String

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(TableName As String, ByVal targetname As String, ByVal strdata As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Connection_Open()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM " & TableName & " WHERE " & targetname & " = '" & strdata & "'", Sql_Connect)
        If Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then
            tmp = True
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        Connection_Close()
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Serial_Scanner_DataReceived(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Scanner.DataReceived

        Dim Incoming As String
        Dim ScanData As String
        Dim s As String
        Dim tmp1, tmp2 As String

        Incoming = Serial_Scanner.ReadLine()

        ScanData = Mid$(Incoming, 1, Len(Incoming) - 1)
        Label_Scanner.Text = ScanData

        Serial_Scanner.DiscardInBuffer()
        s = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 1, 23)
        Label3.Text = s

        'strSQL = "INSERT INTO TABLE_MAIN_RH (PART_NO,FRAME_BARCODE,PART_NAME,SERIAL_NUMBER,ST01_DATE,ST01_START_TIME,ST01_END_TIME,ST01_SAB_RESIST,ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN,ST01_INR_BUCKLE_TQ,ST01_CTR_BUCKLE_SN,ST01_CTR_BUCKLE_TQ,ST01_COLOR,ST01_DECISION) VALUES (" &
        '               "'" & srcPartNo.Text & "','" &
        '                        TmpFrameBarcode & "','" &
        '                        Trim(srcPartName.Text) & "','" &
        '                        srcSerialNumber.Text & "','" &
        '                        Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "','" &
        '                       StartTime & "','" &
        '                       Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "','" &
        '                       LABEL_Resist.Text & "','" &
        '                       srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text & "','" &
        '                       srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text & "','" &
        '                       srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text & "','" &
        '                       srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text & "','" &
        '                       PRODUCT_COLOR & "','" &
        '                       "OK" & "')"

        If wStep = 9 Then

            If ScanData.Contains(srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST01_CTR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            ElseIf ScanData.Contains(srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text) Then
                If CheckDuplicate("TABLE_MAIN_RH", "ST01_INR_BUCKLE_SN", ScanData) = True Then
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "중복"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                    NG()
                Else
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode.Text = ScanData
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK"
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    DingDOng()
                End If

            Else
                NG()
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then

            If Len(s) = 23 Then
                TmpFrameBarcode = s
                serialNumberPart = Mid(Label_Scanner.Text, 13, 11)
                serialNumber = Label_Scanner.Text
                Init_Control()
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                Save_WorkPArt(serialNumberPart)
                Load_PArt(serialNumberPart)
                '3.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then

            If Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("NNB") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.Black
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.White
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "NNB"
                tmp1 = srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                tmp2 = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp1
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp2
                wStep = 4
            ElseIf Label_Scanner.Text.Contains("WDN") Then
                srcColorNNB.BackColor = Color.White
                srcColorWDN.BackColor = Color.Black
                PRODUCT_COLOR = "WDN"
                tmp1 = srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                tmp2 = srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR
                srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp1
                srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Target.Text = tmp2
                wStep = 4
            Else
                NG()
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Barcode_Print()

        Serial_Printer.Write("^XA")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO90,100^BY2,5.0^BXN,5,200,,,,^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,60^A0N,60,40^FD" & srcPartNo.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,120^A0N,60,20^FD" & srcSerialNumber.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^FO220,180^A0N,40,20^FD" & srcPartName.Text & "^FS")
        Serial_Printer.Write("^XZ")

    End Sub

    Private Sub Load_PArt(ByVal str As String)

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE Part_No = '" & str & "'", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            StartTime = Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss")

            srcPartNo.Text = Rs.Fields("Part_No").Value
            srcPartName.Text = Replace(Rs.Fields("Part_Name").Value, " ", "")
            Dim tmp As String

            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(srcPartName.Text)
                If Asc(Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)) <> 63 Then tmp = tmp & Mid(srcPartName.Text, i, 1)
            Next

            srcPartName.Text = tmp
            LoadPicture(srcPicturebox1, str)

            OptionSAb = Rs.Fields("SAB_SERIAL").Value
            OPTION_LHRH = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_LHRH").Value)
            OPTION_CAR_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CAR_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_COUNTRY = Rs.Fields("OPTION_COUNTRY").Value

            OPTION_TYPE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_TYPE").Value)
            OPTION_WS = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_WS").Value)
            OPTION_CTR_TETHER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CTR_TETHER").Value)
            OPTION_HEATER = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_HEATER").Value)
            OPTION_REMOTE = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_REMOTE").Value)
            OPTION_CLR = Trim(Rs.Fields("OPTION_CLR").Value)

            TARGET_CTR_BUCKLE_SN = Trim(Rs.Fields("CTR_BUCKLE_SERIAL").Value)

            Else

            End If

            Else

                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = ""
                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_SPEC.Text = BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN & " ~ " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX & " " & BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_UNIT

            ElseIf OPTION_COUNTRY.Contains("RUSSIA") Then

            End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    Private Function OptionConvert(str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = ""
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = "PASS"
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function OptionConvertInt(str As String) As Integer

        Dim tmp As Integer

        If str = "ON" Then
            tmp = 1
        ElseIf str = "OFF" Then
            tmp = 0
        ElseIf str = "PASS" Then
            tmp = 100
        End If

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub Read_RFiD()

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then

            Dim readCmd As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H07") & Chr("&H05") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                          Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H32") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8") & Chr("&H03")
            Serial_RFID.Write(readCmd)
            WriteLog("[RFID_READ_CMD] 읽기명령전송 Hex=" & ToHex(readCmd) & " Len=" & readCmd.Length)

        Else
            WriteLog("[RFID_READ_CMD] 실패! Serial_RFID.IsOpen=False")
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub Write_RFID(str As String)

        Dim i As Integer

        Dim tmp1 As String = Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H02") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H1E") & Chr("&H06") & Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H00") &
                                                Chr("&H00") & Chr("&H17") & Chr("&H03") & Chr("&HE8")
        Label_Scanner.Text = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")
        tmp1 = tmp1 & str & Chr("&H03")

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Serial_RFID.Write(tmp1)
            WriteLog("[RFID_WRITE] 쓰기명령전송 데이터=""" & str & """ Len=" & str.Length & " 전체Hex=" & ToHex(tmp1) & " 전체Len=" & tmp1.Length)
        Else
            WriteLog("[RFID_WRITE] 실패! Serial_RFID.IsOpen=False 데이터=""" & str & """")
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask1()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim sRecvData As String = ""

        WriteLog("[RFID_THREAD] 수신 스레드 시작")

        Do
            Try

                Dim Incoming1 As String = Serial_RFID.ReadByte
                If Incoming1 Is Nothing Then
                Else
                    sRecvData = sRecvData & Chr(Incoming1)
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then 'ETX
                        Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()

                        ' 수신 원본 데이터 전체 로그
                        WriteLog("[RFID_RECV] 수신완료 Len=" & sRecvData.Length & " Hex=" & ToHex(sRecvData))

                        If sRecvData.Length = 7 Or sRecvData.Length = 6 Then
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = "Empty"
                            WriteLog("[RFID_RECV] 결과=Empty (Len=" & sRecvData.Length & ")")
                        Else
                            Dim parsed As String = Mid(sRecvData, 6, 23)
                            Label_RF_READ.Text = parsed
                            TmpRfidDAta = Label_RF_READ.Text
                            WriteLog("[RFID_RECV] 파싱결과=""" & parsed & """ Len=" & parsed.Length & " TmpRfidDAta=""" & TmpRfidDAta & """")
                        End If
                        sRecvData = ""
                    End If
                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                WriteLog("[RFID_THREAD] 예외! " & ex.Message & " sRecvData Hex=" & ToHex(sRecvData))
                sRecvData = ""
                Serial_RFID.DiscardInBuffer()
            End Try

        Loop

    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTask2()

        Dim Incoming1 As String
        Dim ToolData As Double

        Do While Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True

            Try

                If Serial_Tool1.BytesToRead > 0 Then

                    Incoming1 = Serial_Tool1.ReadChar
                    If Incoming1 = 3 Then

                        If Len(Tool_String) = 59 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0002" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200060            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 26 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0005" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00209999            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) = 22 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "9999" Then
                            Tool_Connection = True
                        ElseIf Len(Tool_String) > 200 And Mid(Tool_String, 6, 4) = "0061" Then
                            Serial_Tool1.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool_String, 146, 2))))
                            label_Message.Text = ToolData.ToString()

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                                srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ.Text = ToolData

                                If ToolData >= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MIN And ToolData <= BASIC_INR_BUCKLE_TQ_MAX And Mid(Tool_String, 109, 1) = "1" Then
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                    DingDOng()
                                Else
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NG"
                                    srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.BackColor = Color.Red
                                    NG()
                                End If

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool_String = ""
                        Serial_Tool1.DiscardInBuffer()

                    Else

                        Tool_String = Tool_String & Chr(Incoming1)

                    End If

                End If

            Catch ex As Exception

                Incoming1 = ""
                Tool_String = ""
            End Try

            Application.DoEvents()

        Loop

    End Sub

                            Serial_Tool2.Write(Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("7") & Chr("9") & Chr("2") & "00200062            " & Chr("0") & Chr("3"))
                            ToolData = CDbl(Format(Val(Mid(Tool2_String, 143, 3) & "." & Mid(Tool2_String, 146, 2))))

                            If wStep = 9 Then

                            End If

                        End If

                        Tool2_String = ""

    Private Function STR2ASC(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer

        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            tmp = tmp & Hex(Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)))
        Next

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Function ASC2STR(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim One_Hex, Tmp_Hex, retVal As String
        Dim i As Integer

        retVal = ""
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            One_Hex = Mid(str, i, 1)
            If IsNumeric(One_Hex) Then
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 2)
                i = i + 1
            Else
                Tmp_Hex = Mid(str, i, 4)
                i = i + 3
            End If
            retVal = retVal & Chr("&H" & Tmp_Hex)
        Next
        Return retVal

    End Function

    Private Function Create_Serial() As String

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim tmp As String = ""

        Connection_Open()

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Main_RH WHERE ST01_DATE = '" & Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd") & "'", Sql_Connect)

        tmp = Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd") & Format(Rs.RecordCount + 1, "0000") & srcPartNo.Text

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

        Return tmp

    End Function

    Private Sub PLC_WRITE(ByVal strChr As String, ByVal StartArry As String, ByVal ArryMessage As String)

        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short          'Data for 'DeviceValue'

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Len(ArryMessage))

        For i As Integer = 0 To Len(ArryMessage) - 1
            szDeviceName = szDeviceName & strChr & Format((Int(StartArry) + i), "0000")
            'If i <> Len(ArryMessage - 1) Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName + ControlChars.Lf
            If i < Len(ArryMessage) - 1 Then szDeviceName = szDeviceName & ControlChars.Lf
            sharrDeviceValue(i) = Mid(ArryMessage, i + 1, 1)
        Next

        Try

            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.WriteDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Len(ArryMessage), sharrDeviceValue(0))

        Catch exception As Exception

            'Exception processing
            'MessageBox.Show(exception.Message, Text, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False
            Exit Sub

        End Try

        'The return code of the method is displayed by the hexadecimal.
        'txt_ReturnCode.Text = String.Format("0x{0:x8} [HEX]", iReturnCode)

    End Sub

    Private Sub Check_Now()

        Connection_Open()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Work", Sql_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then

            WORK_PARTNO = Trim(Rs.Fields("WORK_PARTNO").Value)

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close()

    End Sub

    Private TmpRfidDAta As String

    Private rrCount As Double
    Private Sub Tmr_Work1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Work1.Tick

        If StepResistOK = 1 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4061", "1")
            rrCount = 0
            StepResistOK = 2
        ElseIf StepResistOK = 2 Then
            rrCount = rrCount + 0.1
            If rrCount > 1 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4061", "0")
                StepResistOK = 3
            End If
        ElseIf StepResistOK = 3 Then
            StepResistOK = 0
        End If

        Label_Step.Text = wStep

        If PLC_VALUE(0) = 0 And wStep <> 0 Then
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            wStep = 0
        End If

        'If (wStep > 0 And wStep <= 2) And (wStep >= 6 And wStep <= 8) Then
        FLAG_RFID_RUN = True
        'Else
        '    FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        'End If

        If wStep = 0 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(0) = 1 And PLC_VALUE(1) = 1 Then
                wStep = 2
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 2 Then

            Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
            Init_Control()
            wStep = 3

        ElseIf wStep = 3 Then '사양 스캔 대기

            'WORK_PARTNO = ""
            'Check_Now()
            'wStep = 3.1

        ElseIf wStep = 3.1 Then '사양 스캔 완료
            wStep = 3.2
        ElseIf wStep = 3.2 Then '칼라스캔 대기

        ElseIf wStep = 3.3 Then

            wStep = 4

        ElseIf wStep = 4 Then '사양 PLC 전달

            PLC_STRING = "0000000000"

            If OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "DIVE" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "1"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "FOLD" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "2"
            ElseIf OPTION_CAR_TYPE = "HEV" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 3, 1) = "3"
            End If
            If OPTION_REMOTE = 1 Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 10, 1) = "0"
            End If
            If OptionSAb <> "0" Then
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "1"
            Else
                Mid(PLC_STRING, 8, 1) = "0"
            End If
            Mid(PLC_STRING, 1, 1) = "1" 'PC 정상
            PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", PLC_STRING)
            StepResistOK = 0
            wStep = 5

        ElseIf wStep = 5 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(12) = 1 Then
            '    wStep = 6
            'Else
            '    wStep = 4
            'End If
            wStep = 6

        ElseIf wStep = 6 Then

            srcSerialNumber.Text = Create_Serial()
            wStep = 7

        ElseIf wStep = 7 Then

            wStep = 8

        ElseIf wStep = 8 Then

            wStep = 9

        ElseIf wStep = 9 Then ' 버클 스캔 및 토크 작업
            If Resist_Send = False And Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" And Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "NA" Then 'SAB Resist
                Request_Resist()
                Resist_Send = True
            End If
            If ResistUse = False Then
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If OptionSAb = "0" Then
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA"
                Label_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Green
            End If
            If (srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcINR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
                (Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK" Or Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA") Then
                srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
                srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
                wStep = 10
            End If

            'ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            '    If (srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_Barcode_Dec.Text = "PASS") And
            '        (srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "OK" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "NA" Or srcCTR_BUCKLE_TQ_Dec.Text = "PASS") Then
            '        srcTotal_Decision.Text = "OK"
            '        srcTotal_Decision.BackColor = Color.Blue
            '        wStep = 11
            '    End If
        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            If Resist_Send = False Then
                Request_Resist()
                Resist_Send = True
                lblResistError.Visible = True
            End If
            If lblResist.Text = "No Connection" Then
                lblResistError.Visible = False
                wStep = 11
            Else

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 11 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4051", "1")
            wStep = 12

        ElseIf wStep = 12 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(13) = 1 Then
            '    wStep = 13
            'Else
            '    wStep = 11
            'End If
            wStep = 13

        ElseIf wStep = 13 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
                WriteLog("[STEP] 13→13.1 PLC_VALUE(2)=1")
                wStep = 13.1
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.1 Then

            WriteLog("[STEP] 13.1 Write_RFID 호출 srcSerialNumber=""" & srcSerialNumber.Text & """ Len=" & srcSerialNumber.Text.Length & " Hex=" & ToHex(srcSerialNumber.Text))
            Label_Scanner.Text = srcSerialNumber.Text
            Write_RFID(srcSerialNumber.Text)
            Tmr_Count = 0
            wStep = 13.2

        ElseIf wStep = 13.2 Then

            Tmr_Count = Tmr_Count + 0.1
            If Tmr_Count >= 0.2 Then

                WriteLog("[STEP] 13.2 비교 TmpRfidDAta=""" & TmpRfidDAta & """ Len=" & If(TmpRfidDAta IsNot Nothing, TmpRfidDAta.Length.ToString(), "null") &
                         " vs srcSerial=""" & srcSerialNumber.Text & """ Len=" & srcSerialNumber.Text.Length &
                         " 일치=" & (TmpRfidDAta = srcSerialNumber.Text).ToString() &
                         " Label_RF_READ=""" & Label_RF_READ.Text & """")

                If TmpRfidDAta = srcSerialNumber.Text Then
                    LAbel_RF_CHECK.Text = "OK"
                    LAbel_RF_CHECK.BackColor = Color.Blue
                    WriteLog("[STEP] 13.2→13.3 RFID Write 성공!")
                    wStep = 13.3
                Else
                    WriteLog("[STEP] 13.2→13.1 불일치! 재시도")
                    wStep = 13.1
                End If
            End If

        ElseIf wStep = 13.3 Then

            PLC_WRITE("D", "4058", "1")
            wStep = 13.4

        ElseIf wStep = 13.4 Then

            'If PLC_VALUE(2) = 1 Then
            '    wStep = 14
            'Else
            '    wStep = 13.3
            'End If
            wStep = 14

        ElseIf wStep = 14 Then

            Save_DB()
            AddGrid(srcPartNo.Text & PRODUCT_COLOR)
            InitGrid()
            LoadGrid()
            wStep = 15

        ElseIf wStep = 15 Then

            If PLC_VALUE(2) = 0 Then
                PLC_WRITE("D", "4050", "0000000000")
                Label_RF_READ.Text = ""
                wStep = 0
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles MyBase.Load

        Init_Control()
        Control2Arry()
        'Init_Grid()
        Load_Port_Data()
        Load_BASIC_Data()
        SerialOpen()

        ACT_PLC1.ActTimeOut = 500
        ADDRESS_CONNECTION_PLC1 = "192.168.0.140"
        FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = False

        Tmr_Connect1.Interval = 500
        Tmr_Connect1.Start()

        FLAG_RFID_RUN = False
        RF_READ_COUNT = 0

        WriteLog("========== 프로그램 시작 ==========")
        WriteLog("[INIT] RFID포트=" & PortNumber_RFID & " Serial_RFID.IsOpen=" & Serial_RFID.IsOpen.ToString())

        If Serial_RFID.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask1)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
            WriteLog("[INIT] RFID 수신 스레드 시작됨")
        Else
            WriteLog("[INIT] RFID 수신 스레드 미시작! 시리얼포트 닫힘")
        End If

        If Serial_Tool1.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
        End If

        If Serial_Tool2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd3 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask3)
            Trd3.IsBackground = True
            Trd3.Start()
        End If

        Tmr_Work1.Interval = 100
        Tmr_Work1.Start()

        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Tmr_Connect1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Tmr_Connect1.Tick

        If tError1 = "OK" Then
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Blue
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        Else
            PLC1_ERR.Text = tError1
            PLC1_ERR.BackColor = Color.Red
            PLC1_ERR.ForeColor = Color.White
        End If

        If tStep1 = 0 Then
            PLC_CONNECT()
            tStep1 = 2
        ElseIf tStep1 = 2 Then
            If FLAG_CONNECTION_PLC1 = True Then
                tStep1 = 3
            Else
                tStep1 = 0
            End If
        ElseIf tStep1 = 3 Then
            tError1 = ""
            PLC_READ()
            tStep1 = 4
        ElseIf tStep1 = 4 Then
            If tError1 <> "" Then
                If tError1 = "OK" Then
                    tStep1 = 2
                Else
                    ACT_PLC1.Close()
                    tStep1 = 0
                End If
            End If

        End If

        RF_READ_COUNT = RF_READ_COUNT + 0.25
        If RF_READ_COUNT >= 1 Then
            If FLAG_RFID_RUN = True Then
                WriteLog("[TIMER] Read_RFiD 호출 wStep=" & wStep & " TmpRfidDAta=""" & TmpRfidDAta & """ Label_RF_READ=""" & Label_RF_READ.Text & """")
                Read_RFiD()
            End If
            Label_Time.Text = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
            RF_READ_COUNT = 0
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub PLC_READ()

        Dim i As Integer
        Dim j As Integer
        Dim iReturnCode As Integer              'Return code
        Dim szDeviceName As String = ""         'List data for 'DeviceName'
        Dim iNumberOfDeviceName As Integer = 0  'Data for 'DeviceSize'
        Dim sharrDeviceValue() As Short         'Data for 'DeviceValue'
        Dim szarrData() As String               'Array for 'Data'
        Dim iNumber As Integer                  'Loop counter
        Dim Arrysize As Integer = 24

        ReDim sharrDeviceValue(Arrysize - 1)
        ReDim szarrData(Arrysize - 1)

        szDeviceName = "D4000" & vbLf &
                                "D4001" & vbLf &
                                "D4002" & vbLf &
                                "D4003" & vbLf &
                                "D4004" & vbLf &
                                "D4005" & vbLf &
                                "D4006" & vbLf &
                                "D4007" & vbLf &
                                "D4008" & vbLf &
                                "D4009" & vbLf &
                                "D4010" & vbLf &
                                "D4011" & vbLf &
                                "D4050" & vbLf &
                                "D4051" & vbLf &
                                "D4052" & vbLf &
                                "D4053" & vbLf &
                                "D4054" & vbLf &
                                "D4055" & vbLf &
                                "D4056" & vbLf &
                                "D4057" & vbLf &
                                "D4058" & vbLf &
                                "D4059" & vbLf &
                                "D4060" & vbLf &
                                "D4061"
        Try
            iReturnCode = ACT_PLC1.ReadDeviceRandom2(szDeviceName, Arrysize, sharrDeviceValue(0))
        Catch exException As Exception
            'Exception processing
            MessageBox.Show(exException.Message, Name, MessageBoxButtons.OK, MessageBoxIcon.Error)
            Exit Sub
        End Try

        'When the ReadDeviceRandom2 method is succeeded, display the read data.
        If iReturnCode = 0 Then

            'Copy the read data to the 'lpszarrData'.
            For iNumber = 0 To iNumberOfDeviceName - 1
                szarrData(iNumber) = sharrDeviceValue(iNumber).ToString()
            Next iNumber
            For i = 0 To Arrysize - 1
                PLC_VALUE(i) = CInt(sharrDeviceValue(i))
            Next i

            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j)
                If VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_IN_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next
            For j = 0 To 11
                VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = PLC_VALUE(j + 12)
                If VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).Text = "0" Then
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.Black
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.White
                Else
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).ForeColor = Color.White
                    VALUE_OUT_LABEL(j).BackColor = Color.Black
                End If
            Next

            tError1 = "OK"

        Else

            tError1 = Dec2Hex(iReturnCode)

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub LampOK()

        Const C_index As Byte = 0
        Const C_type As Byte = 0

        Const D_not As Short = 100 ' Don't care  // Do not change before state
        Const C_lampoff As Byte = 0
        Const C_lampon As Byte = 1
        Const C_lampblink As Byte = 2

        Dim b_in As Boolean
        Dim b_vb As Boolean

        Dim bData(17) As Byte

        bData(0) = C_lampoff ' Red
        bData(1) = C_lampoff ' Yellow
        bData(2) = C_lampon ' Green
        'bData(3) = C_lampon ' Blue
        'bData(4) = C_lampblink ' White

        ' Sound      0-(off)   1-4(Sound select)
        ' Else ' Don't care   Do not change before state
        bData(5) = 0

        b_in = Usb_Qu_write(0, 0, bData(0))

        If b_in = 0 Then
            b_vb = False
        Else
            b_vb = True
        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With GridCount

            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 3
            .Rows = 1
            .FixedRows = 2
            .FrozenBottomRows = 1

            .Column(1).Locked = True
            .Column(2).Locked = True

            For i As Integer = 1 To 2

                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter

            Next

            .Column(0).Width = 0
            .Column(1).Width = 240
            .Column(2).Width = 150

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "생산수량"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()

        End With

    End Sub


    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT JObPartNo,JobCount FROM Table_Count ORDER BY LEN(JobPartNo),JobPartNo", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then
        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            Rs.MoveFirst()

            If Rs.BOF = True Or Rs.EOF = True Then
            Else
                Do Until Rs.EOF

                    GridCount.AddItem(Rs.Fields("JobPartNo").Value & Chr(9) & Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If

            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()

        End If

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub ResetGrid()

        Dim strSQL As String

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        strSQL = "DELETE * FROM TABLE_COUNT"
        Mdb_Connect.Execute(strSQL)
        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub AddGrid(strPart As String)

        Connection_Open_MDB()

        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim TmpInt As Integer

        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic

        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Count WHERE JobPartNo = '" & strPart & "'", Mdb_Connect)

        If Rs.RecordCount = 0 Then

            Rs.AddNew()

            Rs.Fields("JobPartno").Value = strPart
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = "1"
            Rs.Update()

        ElseIf Rs.RecordCount >= 1 Then

            TmpInt = CInt(Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value)
            TmpInt = TmpInt + 1
            Rs.Fields("JobCount").Value = CStr(TmpInt)
            Rs.Update()

        End If

        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()

        Connection_Close_MDB()

    End Sub

    Private StepResistOK As Integer

    Private Sub Serial_Resist_DataReceived(ByVal sender As System.Object, ByVal e As System.IO.Ports.SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles Serial_Resist.DataReceived
        Dim Incoming3 As String
        Dim tmp As String

        Incoming3 = Serial_Resist.ReadLine()
        Serial_Resist.DiscardInBuffer()

        tmp = Mid$(Incoming3, 1, Len(Incoming3) - 1)

        If wStep = 9 Then
            If Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text <> "OK" Then

                If Resist_Send = True Then

                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                        'LABEL_Resist.Text = "No Connection"
                    Else
                        If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                            Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                            LABEL_Resist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                            lblResist.Text = LABEL_Resist.Text
                        ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                            Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                            LABEL_Resist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                            lblResist.Text = LABEL_Resist.Text
                        End If

                        'If (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) >= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(srcSAB_Resist.Text) <= BASIC_SAB_RESIST_MAX) Then
                        Try
                            If (CDbl(LABEL_Resist.Text) >= RESIST_MIN) And (CDbl(LABEL_Resist.Text) <= RESIST_MAX) Then
                                DingDOng()
                                Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK"
                                Label_ResistTest_Dec.BackColor = Color.Blue
                                StepResistOK = 1
                            End If
                        Catch ex As Exception

                        End Try

                    End If
                    Resist_Send = False
                End If

            End If
        ElseIf wStep = 10 Then
            If Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "OK" Or Label_ResistTest_Dec.Text = "NA" Then
                If Resist_Send = True Then
                    If Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+30" Then
                        lblResist.Text = "No Connection"
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "-03" Then
                        Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5)) / 100
                        lblResist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                    ElseIf Mid$(tmp, 9, 3) = "+00" Then
                        Resist_Value = Val(Mid$(tmp, 2, 5))
                        lblResist.Text = Format(Resist_Value + RESIST_OFFSET, "0.00")
                    Else
                        lblResist.Text = "No Connection"
                    End If
                    Resist_Send = False
                End If
            End If
        End If
        
    End Sub
End Class
